title: orchis lactea var. conica
intro: Orchis lactea var. conica, also known as the white orchid or conical milk orchid, is a variety of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Orchis lactea var. conica include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
